metadata.title: Test your business idea before wasting time (or money)
metadata.description: Our AI analyzes your idea from all angles – market, target, problem, solution, business model – and provides you with clear, fast, and visual validation.

toast.title: Report unlocked
toast.description: All report sections are now available.

hero.title: Test your business idea before wasting time (or money)
hero.description: Our AI analyzes your idea from all angles – market, target, problem, solution, business model – and provides you with clear, fast, and visual validation.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Describe your idea
step1.description1: No need to have a business plan in mind, or even a perfectly clear concept. You can enter a simple idea, an intuition, a desire — like "an app to exchange clothes between neighbors" or "a solution to help freelancers better manage their income".
step1.description2: The AI understands your intention, even if it's vague. And if you're short on inspiration? No problem: it can also suggest coherent and original ideas to explore.
step1.objective: 🎯 Objective: Start without pressure, whether you're a beginner or experienced.
questions: Describe your business or project idea in detail
Where do you want to deploy your idea?
What problem does your idea solve for your potential customers?
Who are your target customers?
How would your idea generate revenue?
What is the name of your idea?
placeholders: Example: A mobile app that allows dog owners to find nearby dog walkers...
Example: Paris, New York, London, France etc.
Example: Help dog owners find nearby dog walkers
Example: Young parents, dog owners, elderly people, etc.
Example: Monthly subscription, commissions, online booking, one-time payment, etc.
Example: Lukli

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: AI analyzes and structures your idea
step2.description1: As soon as your idea is entered, the AI gets to work. It thinks like a business analyst, product expert, marketer, and investor combined. It identifies your market segment, potential customer profile, the problem you're solving, and the relevance of your solution.
step2.description2: It will also propose a logical business model, a strategy to acquire your first users, and identify the strengths and weaknesses of your idea. All of this is generated with global coherence: each element is connected to the others.
step2.objective: 💡 In seconds, you have a complete vision of your project, far beyond simple brainstorming.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Explore
step3.description1: Your report is a reflection base. It allows you to take a step back, challenge your convictions and identify the most promising levers.
step3.description2: Each section of the report is clear, structured and designed to be actionable. You can read, compare, adjust mentally or in writing. Need a new perspective? Generate another version from a different angle, a different niche or a related problem.
step3.objective: 🧠 It's like a quick reflection tool designed to help you clarify, iterate and move forward.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Get a clear, actionable, validated result
step4.description1: In minutes, you leave with: ✅ A clear, structured idea, ready to be pitched ✅ A validation score calculated from key criteria (coherence, clarity, viability) ✅ A complete sheet that you can export, rework or present
step4.description2: No more uncertainty, no more doubts, no more blockages. You have a solid foundation to move forward, make decisions, or simply know if your idea deserves your energy.

q1.question: Does AI replace real market research?
q1.answer:
No. The tool uses artificial intelligence (GPT from OpenAI) to provide a structured and strategic reading of your idea, but it doesn't replace on-the-ground market research.
It's a fast validation step, designed for early-stage creators who want to assess their idea before investing too much time or money.
Think of it as having a strategic mentor at your fingertips.

q2.question: What is the process?
q2.answer:
1. You answer 6 simple questions about your business idea (problem, target, solution, revenue, etc.)
2. An expert AI (based on OpenAI's GPT models) analyzes your answers and generates a structured report
3. You get a clear overview of your project, with recommendations, validation signals, and red flags
4. You can then adjust, regenerate, or explore variations to refine your idea and take action quickly

q3.question: Is my data confidential?
q3.answer:
Yes, your data is confidential.
It is never sold, shared, or used for commercial purposes.
The answers you provide are only used to generate your personalized report, and are not permanently stored or analyzed for any other purpose.
We respect your privacy and apply best security practices.

q4.question: How accurate is the data?
q4.answer:
The analyses are generated based on your input, combined with advanced language models (GPT from OpenAI), trained on millions of business cases, market trends, and entrepreneurial strategies.
It's not absolute truth, but rather a powerful strategic thinking tool that helps you gain clarity, identify weak signals, and avoid common pitfalls.
The more precise your answers are, the more useful, concrete, and actionable your report will be.

q5.question: Can I get a refund?
q5.answer:
No, purchases are non-refundable.
Due to the nature of the service — immediate and personalized report generation — each purchase is considered final.
We encourage you to review examples and explanations carefully before making a payment.

whatYouGet.title: What you'll get
whatYouGet.subtitle: A complete, structured, and directly usable report
whatYouGet.description: Starting from a simple idea, you get a detailed report that transforms intuition into a solid concept. The goal: save you time, prevent building in a vacuum, and give you a clear vision of your project's potential.
whatYouGet.listTitle: Here's everything you'll find in your report:

audience.title: Audience & market segment
audience.description: You discover exactly who your idea is for. The AI identifies a precise segment, with clear characteristics (age, behavior, consumption patterns) to help you target effectively.

marketAnalysis.title: Market analysis
marketAnalysis.description: You understand the environment you're entering. Market size, dynamics, maturity, saturation or opportunities: AI helps you see if you're entering a promising or risky space.

realProblem.title: Real problem
realProblem.description: An idea is only valuable if it solves a real problem. AI helps you formulate your target's main pain point precisely. You'll know what your product needs to solve concretely.

adaptedSolution.title: Adapted solution
adaptedSolution.description: A relevant solution doesn't come out of nowhere. AI proposes a response coherent with the problem and target, designed to be actionable, credible, and simple to test.

businessModel.title: Viable business model
businessModel.description: Without monetization, there's no business. Your report includes the revenue strategy best suited to your project: subscription, commission, one-shot, freemium model, etc.

acquisition.title: Acquisition strategy
acquisition.description: Having an idea is good. Knowing how to find your first users is better. AI suggests channels adapted to your target, whether it's SEO, partnerships, content, or communities.

valueProposition.title: Unique value proposition
valueProposition.description: Why should people choose your idea? A clear and differentiating formula that summarizes how your solution is better or different from what already exists.

competition.title: Competition & alternatives
competition.description: Just because you're the only one thinking about it doesn't mean you're alone in the market. AI identifies players close to your idea and shows you where you can differentiate intelligently.

risks.title: Limitations and risks
risks.description: Every idea has flaws. Knowing them in advance gives you a head start. You receive an analysis of potential blockers (technical, adoption, market...) to better anticipate.

validationScore.title: Global validation score
validationScore.description: A simple and visual score that helps you know if your idea deserves to be developed now. Based on coherence, problem relevance, business model solidity, and market maturity.

story.intro: Let me tell you a story...
story.title: I had an idea. But I didn't know if it really held up.

content.intro: I'm Daniel. I'm a developer, and like many, I've often had business ideas.
content.p1: One day, I had one that seemed promising.
content.p2: I wrote it down, started imagining the features, the design, even a domain name...
content.p3: But quickly, a doubt blocked me:
doubts: Does this idea address a real need?
Would people be willing to pay for this?
content.p4: I didn't want to code in a vacuum.
content.p5: I wanted to be sure before committing.
content.p6: That's why I created this tool.
content.p7: An AI that takes a raw idea and transforms it into a structured, validated, and actionable concept.
content.p8: Today, I use it for myself. And now, you can too.

cta.title: Your idea deserves better than doubt
cta.description: Test it in a few clicks. Get clear validation and take action today.

options.title: Start with the Discovery plan if:
options.description: You're curious, want to test the tool, or simply explore a first idea without commitment.

options.title: Go for the Complete Report if:
options.description: You have a specific idea to validate and want a complete analysis to make a decision immediately.

options.title: Choose the Standard Bundle if:
options.description: You're in a creative phase, exploring several ideas, and need to validate up to 5 concepts with in-depth analyses.

options.title: Upgrade to the Premium Bundle if:
options.description: You're in a structured approach, needing to systematically compare many ideas or work on multiple projects in parallel.

targetProfiles.title: Who is it for?
targetProfiles.description: Our tool is designed for anyone with ideas who wants to validate their viability before fully committing.

developers.title: Developers & Side Project Creators
developers.question: You have a cool idea, you could code it this weekend... but you don't know if anyone would be interested?
developers.action: Validate it before opening VS Code.

students.title: Students
students.question: Want to get started but don't know where to begin?
students.action: AI helps you lay the foundations for a structured, clear, and credible project.

freelancers.title: Freelancers
freelancers.question: Want to create an additional offer or service?
freelancers.action: Use the tool to test its relevance, market, and added value before launching.

entrepreneurs.title: Project Leaders & Aspiring Entrepreneurs
entrepreneurs.question: Want to start your business but hesitating between several ideas?
entrepreneurs.action: You can test them, compare them, and move forward with the most solid one.

curious.title: Even Curious Minds & Idea Tinkerers
curious.question: No need to be "serious" to start.
curious.action: Sometimes, a simple validated idea can change your daily life (or your career).
